g.title: COPYPASTE
g.text: Time-lagged DAG the way you described it — the base cascade, copied per wave, linked across time

g.title: cluster_1
g.text: WAVE t · the base DAG (a copy)

g.title: cluster_2
g.text: WAVE t+1 · the base DAG (a copy)

g.title: NOTE
g.text: Within each wave: the full base cascade (SP→LS→PA→NW→WR, RV→EV…).
Across waves: grey = carry-over (same skill next wave); dashed pink = reverse (reading→language).
Omitted: intervention (IG/IS), hearing (HS), age (A), ability (GA) feed the skills each wave.
